rows.label: tev078201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Arsenican about the planet where he was born.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Arsenican about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0001
rows.name:
If I close my eyes, I can still
see its contaminated land masses
and seas of black sludge. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0002
rows.name:
The spoiled wood of its rotted forests
reeked as strongly as the voltant-drenched
ruins in its barren wastelands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0003
rows.name:
It was a paradise that Golbogga
created at the same time he breathed
life into the Zaruboggan. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Oh, how I yearn to return home
one day! *fsssh* This world is
far too pure for the likes of us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0007
rows.name:
Ahhh, the moment of pure bliss when
I submerged myself into that polluted
Nightglow Forest swamp... *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0008
rows.name:
It was a taste I'd not experienced
in all the time since I arrived
on this planet. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Sparkling lights burst throughout my
brain, and my entire body seemed to
float. *fsssh* Oh, the ecstasy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0010
rows.name: *fssssssssssssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Er, I mean... *fsssh* I feel deep remorse
for my actions, and will never trouble
my companions like that again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Arsenican about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Now that I've had a chance to tour your
waste-processing units, I have fallen in
love with you humans all over again. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0013
rows.name:
I never would have imagined that so
much voltant was being produced in
this city day in and day out! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0014
rows.name:
Please, humans! I beg of you! *fsssh* You
must continue polluting this planet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0015
rows.name:
Then my people will be able to
sup upon the sweet fruits of
devoltanization! *fsssh* Ahhhhh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Arsenican about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_SEL2031
rows.name: Ask Arsenican what he intends to do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0016
rows.name:
Yesterday, I had my first opportunity in a long
time to speak with the child I disgorged. *fsssh*
I can't believe how much little Orleron has grown![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Apparently he's become quite close
with a human woman. She taught
him to call me "Dad." *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0018
rows.name:
It was a strange feeling. *fsssh*
He is truly a part of a new
generation of Zaruboggan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0019
rows.name:
I bet he'll go on to devoltanize
more voltant than I or any of
his ancestors. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Compared to Bedun, which the almighty
Golbogga bestowed upon us, this
planet is much too pure. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0024
rows.name:
While Mira's purity has long been a
source of despair for me, you have
brought hope back to my life. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0025
rows.name:
The incredible speed with which
your people produce voltant is
truly inspiring. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0026
rows.name:
Your waste-processing units overflow with
more voltant-drenched garbage than you
could ever hope to dispose of! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0027
rows.name:
I believe that you humans will one day
transform Mira into a foul paradise
the equal of Bedun itself! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Arsenican about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Thank you for aiding Orleron
on his search for voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0021
rows.name:
I understand that by working closely
with your people, he has discovered
numerous sources of voltant. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078201_MSG0022
rows.name:
I must confess that I was worried at first,
but I am truly relieved to see what a
splendid Zaruboggan he has become! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]
